description_long: This is a modern bungalow situated on a rectangular plot with a surrounding fence and a circular driveway feature in the front yard. The structure has a combination of single and double-story sections, with a prominent gable roof and multiple rooflines intersecting at different heights. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding, contrasted by dark, matte roofing material. Large rectangular windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes a paved driveway that curves around the front and side, leading to what appears to be a garage or carport area. The landscaping is minimal, with a large grassy area and a circular paved feature, likely intended as a decorative or functional element.
description: A modern bungalow with intersecting gable roofs, light siding, large windows, and a circular driveway feature on a fenced plot.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, circular driveway feature, and the prominent gable roof over the entry section.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back facade, fenced perimeter, and the extension of the driveway along the side.
description_view_2: Right-side view displaying the double-story section, large rectangular window, and the continuation of the driveway.
description_view_3: Left-side view focusing on the side yard, large window, and the circular driveway feature in the front lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rectangular windows on multiple facades
